# Pinned requirements for BlissClip backend (M-14)
# Generated from requirements.in — do NOT edit manually.
# Regenerate with: pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements.in -o requirements.txt
#
# Using compatible-release (~=) until pip-compile with --generate-hashes is wired
# into CI.  Compatible-release pins the minor version, e.g. ~=0.109.2 means
# >=0.109.2, ==0.109.*.  This prevents silent major-version upgrades while
# still allowing bugfix updates.
